_instructions: mcporter routes MCP server connections for OpenClaw. Copy this to your mcporter config location. Replace all YOUR_* placeholders. Remove any server blocks you don't need.
_mcporter_config_location: Run 'mcporter config path' to find where this file should live on your system.

neural-memory._comment: Local SQLite knowledge graph. Layer 3 of the Adam Framework. Required for full memory functionality.

firecrawl._comment: Web scraping and search. Recommended replacement for built-in web search. Get a free key at firecrawl.dev

gemini._comment: Google Gemini — text, vision, document analysis. Optional.

desktop-commander._comment: File system and terminal access for the AI. Gives the AI real tools to work with. Install: npm install -g @desktop-commander/mcp

openrouter._comment: Routes tasks to other AI models (DeepSeek, GPT-4o, Claude, Llama, etc). Optional — useful for sub-agent orchestration.

_adding_more_servers: Search npm for 'mcp-server' to find community MCP servers for Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, and more. Any MCP-compatible server can be added here.
_security_note: Never commit this file with real API keys. Use environment variables or a .env file.
